name: Wolfgang Puck's Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop mushrooms and lemon juice in a food processor.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add shallot and sauté lightly.
3. Add mushrooms, bay leaf, and thyme to the skillet. Cook, stirring frequently, until all liquid has evaporated, about 10 minutes.
4. Blend cream, chicken stock, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes. Mix cornstarch dissolved in water separately.
6. Continue simmering for an additional 10 minutes. Adjust seasoning as needed.
7. Serve the soup hot in heated bowls, garnished with chopped parsley. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
